creator: optical@linux.nu
text:
I'm having problem with my Macronix NIC. When i boot the kernel, the sytem finds it. And says couldn't map ports/memory
device_probe_and_attach returned 6 Any idea how to fix this? without buying a new nic =) The card works perfectly under Linux with the tulip module. I compiled my kernel only adding one row in the config file: device pcm
